---
title: 'Tongues | The Foreshadowing'
date: '2015-04-21T04:09:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7800177154445592184'
blogger_filename: '/2015/04/tongues-foreshadowing.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Spiritual Growth'
---

<span xmlns=""></span><br /><span xmlns=""></span><br /><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody><tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/all-rights-reserved-lion-tongue-by-doug-wheller-505f8f8391f6.jpg" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img alt="All rights reserved &quot;Lion tongue&quot; by Doug Wheller       1 Now concerning spiritual gifts, brethren, I do not want you to be ignorant" border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/all-rights-reserved-lion-tongue-by-doug-wheller-505f8f8391f6.jpg" title="All rights reserved &quot;Lion tongue&quot; by Doug Wheller      1 Now concerning spiritual gifts, brethren, I do not want you to be ignorant" width="305" /></a></td></tr><tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;">All rights reserved <a href="https://flic.kr/p/feCWYU" target="_blank">"Lion tongue" by Doug Wheller</a></div></td></tr></tbody></table><br /><span xmlns=""></span><span xmlns=""></span><br /><div style="-webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; color: black; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; font-size: medium; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-weight: normal; letter-spacing: normal; line-height: normal; margin: 0px; orphans: auto; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: 1; word-spacing: 0px;"></div><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/2015/04/tongues-foundation.html" target="_blank">Tongues | The Foundation</a></li><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/2015/04/tongues-foreshadowing.html" target="_blank">Tongues | The Foreshadowing</a></li><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/2015/04/tongues-fulfillment.html" target="_blank">Tongues | The Fulfillment</a></li><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/2015/04/tongues-facts.html" target="_blank">Tongues | The Facts</a></li><li><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/2015/04/tongues-familiar.html" target="_blank">Tongues | The Familiar</a></li>.<h2><span xmlns=""><span style="background-color: white;">Tongues What's that about?</span><span style="font-family: &quot;times new roman&quot;;"></span></span></h2><br /><blockquote><span xmlns=""><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/1-corinthians/12.html"><span style="color: black;">1 Corinthians 12</span></a><br />    </span></blockquote><blockquote><span xmlns="">1 Now concerning spiritual gifts, brethren, I do not want you to be ignorant<span style="font-family: &quot;times new roman&quot;; font-size: 12pt;"><br />     </span></span></blockquote><br /><h3><span xmlns=""><span style="background-color: white;">The Foundation of this Study</span></span></h3><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">So many people have undertaken to write on this topic. Over the years I've picked up a little here, and a little there. Much of the teaching out there on this is decent, most if it rubbish. </span>&nbsp;</span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><br />     </span></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">So I've decided to add my study to this hotly debated and&nbsp;intriguing&nbsp;topic as well. I've been studying this subject ever since I was young. But I really started a focused study on the subject in 2003 after I started speaking in tongues myself.&nbsp;I grew up on one side of the debate and now stand on the other.&nbsp;</span><br />    </span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><br /></span><span xmlns=""><span style="background-color: white; color: black;">I grew up in denominations that&nbsp;taught that the gifts had passed away, or maybe never even happened, or were just stories. I spent time in other churches in my teens. I heard that tongues were of the devil. I heard that tongues were from God, but that only certain people could have them. I heard that those who had them should keep it to their home and not bring it out in public. I heard that any public use of them should always be with an&nbsp;interpreter, but mysteriously there was NEVER an occasion where tongues had an&nbsp;interpreter. Interpreting seemed to be an even rarer gift, as it was totally absent from the churches I learned these things from.</span></span><br /><ul><li><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">How did they know so much if they'd never seen or used it?&nbsp;</span><br />     </span></span></li></ul><span xmlns=""><br /></span><span xmlns=""><span style="background-color: white; color: black;">Thus the debate raged on, and I was left to wonder with amazement. Until one day in 2003 I actually met some people who spoke in tongues. They did so freely and unashamed. I was amazed. Thus I began my search for the truth. </span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><br /></span><br /><blockquote><span xmlns=""><span style="background-color: white;">One day I returned to the church I was attending as a "Tongue Talker". </span><br />&nbsp;</span></blockquote><blockquote><span xmlns=""><span style="background-color: white;">They said: "We always knew you were too&nbsp;charismatic for this group". </span><br />&nbsp;</span></blockquote><blockquote class="tr_bq"><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">I took that as a compliment.&nbsp;</span><br />    </span></span></blockquote><span xmlns=""><br />&nbsp;</span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">I will go on record and say that anyone who writes on this subject who doesn't speak themselves in tongues has no great authority to speak on this subject. It's not that it's impossible that they would have something to add, some insight or observation. But... </span></span></span><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;"><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">Would you take pilot lessons or read a manual about flying written/performed by someone who's never flown? </span></span></span></span></span><br />&nbsp;</span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">No! </span><br />    </span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><br /></span><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">Therefore, I would take anything you read about any of the Gifts of the Spirit from an author who doesn't do them with a dose of skepticism, or distance.&nbsp;</span><br />    </span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><br /></span><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">Let me also add to this that I am not THE authority on the subject. </span><br />    </span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><br /></span><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">There are many things to this day I don't understand. Some things I have grown more and more sure of as the years pass by.</span></span><br />&nbsp;</span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">Other things I still questionâ€¦ </span><br />    </span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><br /></span><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">So I may learn something along with you in this study. </span><br />    </span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><br /></span><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;">I reserve the right to be wrong. That is the only honest opinion of one who is still seeking Truth (which we all should be). If I need to be corrected, there is One who can correct me, and the people who are tools He uses to bring that correction. I'm open to understanding this better than I do today. </span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><br /></span><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">If you are not reading this because you honestly want the truth... turn it off. </span></span><br />&nbsp;</span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">Don't bother. </span><br />    </span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><br /></span><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">If you want to add something to the study you think I've missed, hit me up on social media, or email <a href="mailto:Me@DarrellWolfe.Com" target="_blank">Me@DarrellWolfe.Com</a>. I will consider with prayer any comments or emails that are tasteful, well thought through, and spoken in LOVE. </span><br />    </span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><br /></span><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">Having said that. Let us beginâ€¦</span><br />    </span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><br />&nbsp;</span><br /><h3><span xmlns=""><span style="background-color: white;">In The&nbsp;Beginning</span></span></h3><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">Ever since Peter stood among a group of 120 believers in Jerusalem there has been debate about what this is and what it isn't. So what is this about? When the first 120 people were speaking with tongues in Jerusalem there were divided reactions. Some people thought there was&nbsp;something&nbsp;wondrous&nbsp;happening from God. Others figured these people were just drunk. And thus the first debate over the nature and origin of tongues was fired in the first few minutes. </span></span><br />&nbsp;</span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">Satan has been fighting tongues ever since, so they must be fairly important!</span><br />    </span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><br />&nbsp;</span><br /><div style="margin-left: 27pt;"><span xmlns=""><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/acts/2.html"><span style="background-color: white;"><i>Acts 2</i></span></a><span style="color: black;"><br />    </span></span></div><div style="margin-left: 27pt;"><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;"><i>11 Cretans and Arabs--we hear them speaking in our own tongues the wonderful works of God." 12 So they were all amazed and perplexed, saying to one another, "Whatever could this mean?" 13 Others mocking said, "<b>They are full of new wine</b>." 14 But Peter, standing up with the eleven, raised his voice and said to them, "Men of Judea and all who dwell in Jerusalem, let this be known to you, and heed my words. 15&nbsp;<b>For these are not drunk, as you suppose</b>, since it is only the third hour of the day. 16 But this is what was spoken by the prophet Joel:</i></span><span style="font-family: &quot;times new roman&quot;; font-size: 12pt;"><br />     </span></span></span></div><span xmlns=""><br />&nbsp;</span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;">To speak about Tongues in any&nbsp;holistic&nbsp;sense we must talk about all its aspects and references. Contrary to popular teaching tongues is not a New Testament phenomena. However, like all the gifts, it didn't flourish until the New Testament. </span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><br /></span><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;">Let us first take a look at God's order of things. This is important. Without understanding the importance of Words to God, one has no proper framework by which to understand such a controversial and strange topic.&nbsp;</span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><br /></span><br /><h3><span xmlns="">The Word of God (or God's Words)</span></h3><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;">In&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/genesis/1.html">Genesis 1</a>&nbsp;we see an interesting pattern. God is creating the earth. The bible could record that God got down and formed the earth with his hands, had angels do the work, or any number of things. What it records, however, is that He did it with Words.</span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><br /></span><br /><blockquote><span xmlns="">He Saidâ€¦ He Sawâ€¦<br />&nbsp;</span></blockquote><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><b>God created the world from Words.</b>&nbsp;<a href="http://bible.cc/romans/4-17.htm">Romans 4</a>&nbsp;tells us that God's pattern is to call things that are not, as though they are, thus creating them to be. That is how God does things. So Words are God's tool. <a href="http://biblehub.com/hebrews/11-3.htm">Hebrews 11:3</a> tells us that:</span><br />&nbsp;</span><br /><blockquote><span xmlns=""><i>By faith we understand that the universe was created by the word of God, so that what is seen was not made out of things that are visible.</i><br />&nbsp;</span></blockquote><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;">He did not create the world from nothing, he created it from invisible things that create visible things. His Words, full of Energy and Life. Einstein informed us that matter converts to energy and energy converts to matter. So it should not surprise a student of modern Physics that God (who is light/energy/power itself) can release himself into the void and convert that energy into matter. </span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><br /></span><span xmlns=""><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/john/1.html">John Chapter One</a><span style="color: black;">&nbsp;goes on to confirm that not only are God's WORDS important to Him, but that His own Son is His Word. Jesus was the embodiment of His Word. It was Jesus speaking the heart of God into the void, and the Holy Spirit empowering that speech, which created all known matter. The three in one, in perfect harmony.<span style="font-family: &quot;times new roman&quot;; font-size: 12pt;"><br />     </span></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><br /></span><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">When we see Adam created, he is given&nbsp;something no other creation way: speech. </span></span><br />&nbsp;</span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">He created a "speaking spirit like God." Does that mean that man is god? No. It does mean that man is like God. God created man in His Image and His Likeness. God is a spirit and man is a spirit. Man has the ability to speak just like God has the ability to speak. Parrots can use words, but they can't carry a conversation. That is because they were not created to be speaking spirits, only man was. </span><br />    </span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><br /></span><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">Why is this important when talking about tongues? </span></span><br />&nbsp;</span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">Because Tongues are God's Words in our mouths. </span></span><br />&nbsp;</span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">When we speak the Words of God, the same power and force are in them, that were in the Word of Jesus when He created this earth, when he said Lazarus Come Forth, when He said "No man shall eat fruit of thee" and the tree withered and died. The same power and force can be in our wordsâ€¦ </span></span><br />&nbsp;</span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">But it isn't alwaysâ€¦ For most modern men and women that power is either absent, as water from a dried river bed; or, it is diluted. Like watered down soda, which has lost both its taste, and vibrant effervescence. </span></span><br />&nbsp;</span><br /><span xmlns="">How it got that way, why, and what's changed...</span><br /><br /><span xmlns="">That's another story. <span style="color: black;"><span style="background-color: white;">Let's continue along in historyâ€¦ next time. </span></span></span><br /><span xmlns=""><span style="color: black;"><br />    </span></span><br /><br />Until Then #<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/2014/10/be-still-and-be-led-by-his-still-small.html" target="_blank">BeStillBeLed</a>? <br /><br /><br />---<br /><h4>And now I leave you with a question:</h4><h4>&nbsp; </h4><blockquote class="tr_bq"><b>So... Do you speak in Tongues? Why/Why Not? What are your thoughts?</b></blockquote><br /><b>Hit me up on Twitter <a href="https://twitter.com/darrellwolfe" target="_blank">@DarrellWolfe </a>or on Google <a class="g-profile" href="https://plus.google.com/106337514196493406365" target="_blank">+DarrellWolfe</a></b><br /><h4><div><script src="https://apis.google.com/js/plusone.js"></script><g:plus action="share"></g:plus></div></h4><h4>By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></h4><div><ul><li><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , &quot;times new roman&quot; , serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/got-jesus.html" target="_blank">Got Jesus? </a></span></li><li><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , &quot;times new roman&quot; , serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/about-20.html" target="_blank">About This Blog, and Darrell.&nbsp;</a></span></li><li><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , &quot;times new roman&quot; , serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/books-resources.html" target="_blank">Book Suggestions</a></span></li><li><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , &quot;times new roman&quot; , serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/blog-page_27.html" target="_blank">Suggestions for other: Bloggers, Authors, Ministries, Thought Leaders, and More </a></span></li><li><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , &quot;times new roman&quot; , serif;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/my-tool-box.html" target="_blank">My Tool Box: suggestions for some of the tools I've used in my journey. </a></span></li></ul></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-art-e0f7cc956c34.png" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="232" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-art-e0f7cc956c34.png" width="320" /></a></div>
